More polish from Community-Apps feedback — thanks for the reports!

## Fixed
- **The German (and every non-English) UI no longer shows English button labels.** The "Backing up…", "Restoring…", "Loading backups…", "Saving…" and "Done" labels on the container, VM and Settings buttons are now translated across all 26 languages — they were hardcoded English before.

## Changed
- **Sidebar navigation text is easier to read** — a touch brighter in dark mode and darker in light mode.
- **The sidebar logo now sits on a white tile**, so the vault stays clearly visible on the dark theme (and reads fine on the light theme too).

Image: `ghcr.io/junkerderprovinz/bombvault:1.3.7` (also `:1`, `:1.3`, `:latest`), multi-arch (amd64 + arm64).
